html:
2026-0642
2026-06-22PSForeign Influence Transparency and Accountability ActForeign Influence Transparency and Accountability RegulationsForeign Influence Transparency and Accountability Regulations in order to (1) identify the information that must be provided to the Commissioner by a person who enters into an arrangement with a foreign principal, including information on the person, the foreign principal and the nature and scope of the agreement; (2) establish the information displayed in the public-facing registry required under the act; (3) allow for the disclosure of information to specific federal partners, as well as provincial, territorial, and municipal bodies responsible for elections, lobbying, or conflict of interest matters; and (4) establish components of an administrative monetary penalties regime, including the range of penalty amounts, the criteria the Commissioner would consider in determining the penalty amount, the manner in which a notice of violation can be issued, and the ability to enter into compliance agreements.Registration: SOR/2026-0152 Publication Date: 2026-07-01
act: Foreign Influence Transparency and Accountability Act
subject: Foreign Influence Transparency and Accountability Regulations
precis: Foreign Influence Transparency and Accountability Regulations in order to (1) identify the information that must be provided to the Commissioner by a person who enters into an arrangement with a foreign principal, including information on the person, the foreign principal and the nature and scope of the agreement; (2) establish the information displayed in the public-facing registry required under the act; (3) allow for the disclosure of information to specific federal partners, as well as provincial, territorial, and municipal bodies responsible for elections, lobbying, or conflict of interest matters; and (4) establish components of an administrative monetary penalties regime, including the range of penalty amounts, the criteria the Commissioner would consider in determining the penalty amount, the manner in which a notice of violation can be issued, and the ability to enter into compliance agreements.
